PROP-01b-partial1-pre-002.text: bid() must reject bids where amount exceeds contract's current balance of the auctioned asset.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-002.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): amount <= balanceOf(this) => proceed; else revert BidAmountTooHigh

locations.note: balance check guards against overdraft; reverts with error if amount > balanceOf(asset)
